photos.title: Rouffach avGare 46.JPG
photos.description:
Alsace, Haut-Rhin, Rouffach, Maison, ancienne ferme (XIXe), 46 avenue de la Gare. 




 
This building is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference IA68004455 .

photos.title: Rouffach impOrfèvres 5.JPG
photos.description:
Alsace, Haut-Rhin, Rouffach, Maison (XIVe-XVIIe), ancienne cour domaniale d'Eschau, 5 impasse des Orfèvres. 




 
This building is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the reference IA68004498 .

photos.title: Tour des Sorcieres in Rouffach.jpg
photos.description:
Tour des Sorcières in Rouffach, Haut-Rhin, France





 
This building is classé au titre des monuments historiques de la France. It is indexed in the base Mérimée, a database of architectural heritage maintained by the French Ministry of Culture, under the references PA00085660  , PA00085639    and IA68004441 .
